form.formComment: In hot form winning his last three on end, the latest pinging the lids with a fast early split and clocking 29.80 over 520m at this track. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

form.formComment: Backs up quickly after winning easily by 3.5 lengths at Q Lakeside (30.82) beating Rocky Raccoon in a Grade 5/6 on April 7 a couple of days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.
